# Toolproof

> Toolproof is a marketing measurement consultancy based in Karratha, Australia. We help businesses understand whether their marketing is actually working — cutting through vanity metrics to deliver clear, honest analysis.

## Services

- Marketing measurement strategy and audits
- Proof Score: a free self-assessment tool that grades how well a business is set up to measure its marketing effectiveness
- Fractional analytics and measurement consulting

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.toolproof.com.au/): Overview of Toolproof's services and approach
- [Proof Score](https://www.toolproof.com.au/proof-score/): Free tool to assess your marketing measurement maturity
- [Privacy Policy](https://www.toolproof.com.au/privacy.html): How we handle personal data

## Contact

- Email: rob@toolproof.com.au
- Location: Karratha, Western Australia
